chapter_title.en: What Allah (azwj) has Forbidden a Believer to do Against a Fellow Believer

parts.text: وعن أبي جعفر عليه السلام أنه قال

text: : لا ترموا المؤمنين، ولا تتبعوا عثراتهم، فإنه من يتبع عثرة مؤمن يتبع الله عز وجل عثرته، ومن يتبع الله عز وجل عثرته فضحه في بيته.

en.muhajir-b-ali: 188. It has been narrated that Abu Ja'far (a.s) said: Do not revile at the believers and do not try and uncover their faults; for if one discloses the faults of a believer, Allah will disclose his; and if Allah discloses a person's faults, he will be disgraced even in his own home.
